blocking_findings: Truncating before span binding and contradiction/regression checks can suppress disqualifying evidence: a 17th claim could be exactly bindable and introduce a cardinality contradiction or regression while the retained 16 satisfy coverage, allowing diagnostic GO. Raw journaling and overflow receipts do not prevent that false-GO path.
